name: creddump7
title: creddump7
summary: Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives
description:
Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives
This package contains a Python tool to extract various credentials and
secrets from Windows registry hives.
It's based on the creddump program. Many patches and fixes have been applied
by Ronnie Flathers.

commands.name: creddump7
commands.description: creddump7 - Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use creddump7 because Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use creddump7 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `creddump7 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for creddump7.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair creddump7 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `creddump7 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
